title: May 10th, 2021 (2)
body:
- professional
    - i write like i think lyrics
        - i write like i think
        - and i like to drink
        - so i might make a stink face
        - til i find the sink wait
        - i'm a lightsaber link play
        - i like my lifesavers pink pray
        - when i'm in the drink say
        - i think you might have to puke yay
        - when i irl you might try to duke hey
        - you knuck if you buck but i fight like i juke
        - box with a screw loose
        - ox with the yoke off
        - an i don't dig up these rocks just for y'all to choke on
        - spit it out, spit it out
        - go ahead spit out that itty bitty style
        - i'm something you can live without
        - you can't just get down eating everything you meet in the wild
        - there's poison in the voices
        - there's snakes in the rushes
        - there's more than just options in the choices we make
        - that's how passion destroys us
        - you can't trust em not to be dangerous changes
        - they never go home who they came with
        - they go toe to toe with the angels
        - on my feet at the gates cuz these joints are bangers
        - but penetration's the point so i come in at all angles
        - and this round ain't endin on points so i come in at all hours
        - until the ending anoints
        - the hand holding the bell ringing has power
        - i'm just a minor note in a major production
        - punching the clock with my people
        - who get off some time after we got in
        - and don't know when the next breaks comin
        - so we loop this one and run it whenever we wanna
        - freestyle
